Generated Narrative: ValueSet fr-vs-location-body-structure-document

This value set includes codes based on the following rules:

  • Import all the codes that are contained in SNOMED CT Body Structures
  • Import all the codes that are contained in SNOMED CT Anatomical Structure for Administration Site Codes

description:
Codes SNOMED CT autorisés pour décrire une localisation anatomique ou une voie d'abord.
Inclut :
